message:
fix(wire): validate sender identity format in wire protocol

Add input validation for sender identity strings to prevent malformed
or malicious sender IDs from propagating through the wire protocol:

- Must not be empty or whitespace-only
- Must be <= 128 bytes (MAX_SENDER_ID_LEN)
- Must contain only ASCII alphanumeric, hyphen, underscore, or dot

New WireProtocolError::InvalidSender variant with sender and reason
fields. Validation runs in WireEnvelope::from_json() (deserialization)
and Aggregator::ingest_envelope() (ingestion, increments total_rejected).

3 new tests: empty sender rejection, separator character rejection,
aggregator rejection tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
